mapper.select:
SELECT CODE_GROUP, CODE_VALUE, CODE_NAME, UP_CODE, USE_YN, SORT_ORDER FROM COM_CODE WHERE 1 = 1
AND CODE_GROUP IN
#{group}
AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY CODE_GROUP, SORT_ORDER

SELECT DT.MASTER_NO, DT.BIZ_TITLE, DT.CAPACITY, DT.PROJECT_COST, DT.SALES, DT.NPV, DT.IRR, DT.INVESTMENTS, DT.OM, DT.ENGINEERING_FEE, DT.VITAL_ORDER, DT.BUSINESS_PERIOD, DT.CONSTRUTION_PERIOD, TO_CHAR(DT.FOUNDATION_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS FOUNDATION_DATE, TO_CHAR(DT.COMPLETION_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS COMPLETION_DATE, TO_CHAR(DT.REG_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS REG_DATE, TO_CHAR(DT.UPDATE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS UPDATE_DATE, (SELECT SUM(INVESTMENT_EQUITY) FROM NBM_CONTRIBUTIONS WHERE MASTER_NO = DT.MASTER_NO AND GUBUN = '01' AND CORPORATION = '남동발전') AS CONTR1, (SELECT SUM(INVESTMENT_EQUITY) FROM NBM_CONTRIBUTIONS WHERE MASTER_NO = DT.MASTER_NO AND GUBUN = '01' AND CORPORATION != '남동발전') AS CONTR2, (SELECT SUM(INVESTMENT_EQUITY) FROM NBM_CONTRIBUTIONS WHERE MASTER_NO = DT.MASTER_NO AND GUBUN = '02') AS CONTR3, CD1.CODE_NAME AS CD_ACCUNTING_NAME, CD2.CODE_NAME AS CD_AFFILIATE_NAME, CONC.CORP_LIST, MEMB.EMP_NAMES FROM NBM_BIZ_MASTER DT LEFT OUTER JOIN COM_CODE CD1 ON CD1.CODE_GROUP = '150' AND CD1.CODE_VALUE = DT.CD_ACCUNTING AND CD1.USE_YN = 'Y' LEFT OUTER JOIN COM_CODE CD2 ON CD2.CODE_GROUP = '151' AND CD2.CODE_VALUE = DT.CD_AFFILIATE AND CD2.USE_YN = 'Y' LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT MASTER_NO, LISTAGG(CORPORATION || '(' || ROUND(RATE) || '%)', ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY CONTRIBUTIONS_SEQ) AS CORP_LIST FROM NBM_CONTRIBUTIONS WHERE GUBUN = '01' GROUP BY MASTER_NO ) CONC ON DT.MASTER_NO = CONC.MASTER_NO LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT A.MASTER_NO, LISTAGG(B.NAME, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY B.NAME) AS EMP_NAMES FROM NBM_BIZ_MEMBER A LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE B ON B.EMPNO = A.EMPNO GROUP BY A.MASTER_NO ) MEMB ON DT.MASTER_NO = MEMB.MASTER_NO WHERE NVL(DT.DEL_FLAG, 'N') != 'Y'
AND DT.BIZ_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND CONC.CORP_LIST LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND MEMB.EMP_NAMES LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND (DT.BIZ_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR CONC.CORP_LIST LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR MEMB.EMP_NAMES LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
ORDER BY DT.VITAL_ORDER NULLS LAST, DT.REG_DATE DESC, DT.MASTER_NO DESC

SELECT MASTER_NO, BIZ_TITLE, EIS_COMPANY_CODE, BIZ_CONTENT, CAPACITY, LOCATION, CONTINENT_CODE, IMAGE_FILE, PROJECT_COST, SALES, NPV, IRR, INVESTMENTS, OM, ENGINEERING_FEE, CD_AFFILIATE, (SELECT CODE_NAME FROM COM_CODE WHERE CODE_GROUP = '151' AND CODE_VALUE = CD_AFFILIATE AND USE_YN = 'Y') AS CD_AFFILIATE_NAME, CD_ACCUNTING, (SELECT CODE_NAME FROM COM_CODE WHERE CODE_GROUP = '150' AND CODE_VALUE = CD_ACCUNTING AND USE_YN = 'Y') AS CD_ACCUNTING_NAME, LABOR_SERVICE, CONNECTION_INFO, (SELECT CODE_NAME FROM COM_CODE WHERE CODE_GROUP = '152' AND CODE_VALUE = CONNECTION_INFO AND USE_YN = 'Y') AS CONNECTION_INFO_NAME, NATION_CODE, (SELECT CODE_NAME FROM COM_CODE WHERE CODE_GROUP = '107' AND CODE_VALUE = NATION_CODE AND USE_YN = 'Y') AS NATION_NAME, TO_CHAR(FOUNDATION_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS FOUNDATION_DATE, TO_CHAR(COMPLETION_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS COMPLETION_DATE, CONSTRUTION_PERIOD, BUSINESS_PERIOD, ORGANIZATION_INFO, CONTACT_INFO, REGISTER_INFO, BUSINESS_INFO, VITAL_ORDER, DISPATCH_INFO, TO_CHAR(REG_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS REG_DATE FROM NBM_BIZ_MASTER WHERE MASTER_NO = #{masterNo} AND (DEL_FLAG != 'Y' OR DEL_FLAG IS NULL)

SELECT M.MASTER_NO, M.EMPNO, E.NAME AS EMP_NAME, TO_CHAR(M.REG_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS REG_DATE FROM NBM_BIZ_MEMBER M LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE E ON E.EMPNO = M.EMPNO WHERE M.MASTER_NO = #{masterNo} ORDER BY M.REG_DATE

SELECT CONTRIBUTIONS_SEQ, MASTER_NO, GUBUN, CORPORATION, RATE, INVESTMENT_EQUITY, TO_CHAR(REG_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS REG_DATE FROM NBM_CONTRIBUTIONS WHERE MASTER_NO = #{masterNo} ORDER BY CONTRIBUTIONS_SEQ

SELECT PROGRESS_SEQ, MASTER_NO, PROGRESS_DATE, DESCRIPTION, ORDERS, TO_CHAR(REG_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS REG_DATE FROM NBM_PROPULSION_PROGRESS WHERE MASTER_NO = #{masterNo} ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(ORDERS), PROGRESS_SEQ
mapper.insert:
SELECT #{menuCode} || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') || LPAD(TO_CHAR(NBM_MASTER_SEQ.NEXTVAL), 6, '0') FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO NBM_BIZ_MASTER ( MASTER_NO, BIZ_TITLE, EIS_COMPANY_CODE, BIZ_CONTENT, CAPACITY, LOCATION, CONTINENT_CODE, NATION_CODE, IMAGE_FILE, PROJECT_COST, SALES, NPV, IRR, INVESTMENTS, OM, ENGINEERING_FEE, CD_AFFILIATE, CD_ACCUNTING, LABOR_SERVICE, CONNECTION_INFO, FOUNDATION_DATE, COMPLETION_DATE, CONSTRUTION_PERIOD, BUSINESS_PERIOD, REG_DATE, REG_USERID, DEL_FLAG ) VALUES ( #{masterNo}, #{bizTitle}, #{eisCompanyCode}, #{bizContent}, #{capacity}, #{location}, #{continentCode}, #{nationCode}, #{imageFile}, #{projectCost}, #{sales}, #{npv}, #{irr}, #{investments}, #{om}, #{engineeringFee}, #{cdAffiliate}, #{cdAccunting}, #{laborService}, #{connectionInfo},
TO_DATE(#{foundationDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'),
NULL,
TO_DATE(#{completionDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'),
NULL,
#{construtionPeriod}, #{businessPeriod}, SYSDATE, #{regUserid}, 'N' )
mapper.update: UPDATE NBM_BIZ_MASTER SET BIZ_TITLE = #{bizTitle}, EIS_COMPANY_CODE = #{eisCompanyCode}, BIZ_CONTENT = #{bizContent}, CAPACITY = #{capacity}, LOCATION = #{location}, CONTINENT_CODE = #{continentCode}, NATION_CODE = #{nationCode}, IMAGE_FILE = #{imageFile}, PROJECT_COST = #{projectCost}, SALES = #{sales}, NPV = #{npv}, IRR = #{irr}, INVESTMENTS = #{investments}, OM = #{om}, ENGINEERING_FEE = #{engineeringFee}, CD_AFFILIATE = #{cdAffiliate}, CD_ACCUNTING = #{cdAccunting}, LABOR_SERVICE = #{laborService}, CONNECTION_INFO = #{connectionInfo}, FOUNDATION_DATE = TO_DATE(#{foundationDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')NULL, COMPLETION_DATE = TO_DATE(#{completionDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')NULL, CONSTRUTION_PERIOD = #{construtionPeriod}, BUSINESS_PERIOD = #{businessPeriod}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE, UPDATE_USERID = #{updateUserid} WHERE MASTER_NO = #{masterNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NBM_BIZ_MEMBER (MASTER_NO, EMPNO, REG_DATE, REG_USERID) VALUES (#{masterNo}, #{empno}, SYSDATE, #{regUserid})

INSERT INTO NBM_CONTRIBUTIONS ( CONTRIBUTIONS_SEQ, MASTER_NO, GUBUN, CORPORATION, RATE, INVESTMENT_EQUITY, REG_DATE, REG_USERID ) VALUES ( (SELECT NVL(MAX(CONTRIBUTIONS_SEQ), 0) + 1 FROM NBM_CONTRIBUTIONS WHERE MASTER_NO = #{masterNo}), #{masterNo}, #{gubun}, #{corporation}, #{rate}, #{investmentEquity}, SYSDATE, #{regUserid} )

INSERT INTO NBM_PROPULSION_PROGRESS ( PROGRESS_SEQ, MASTER_NO, PROGRESS_DATE, DESCRIPTION, ORDERS, REG_DATE, REG_USERID ) VALUES ( (SELECT NVL(MAX(PROGRESS_SEQ), 0) + 1 FROM NBM_PROPULSION_PROGRESS WHERE MASTER_NO = #{masterNo}), #{masterNo}, #{progressDate}, #{description}, #{orders}, SYSDATE, #{regUserid} )
mapper.update: UPDATE NBM_BIZ_MASTER SET DEL_FLAG = 'Y', UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE MASTER_NO = #{masterNo}
mapper.select:
SELECT I.COMPANY_CODE, I.COMPANY_NAME, I.TYPE, I.BUSINESS_AREA, I.DEPTS, I.INVESTMENT_DATE, I.DESCRIPTION, I.CAPTIALS, I.KOSEP_MONEY, I.KOSEP_RATE, I.ETC, C.GUBUN, (SELECT CODE_NAME FROM COM_CODE WHERE CODE_GROUP = '160' AND CODE_VALUE = C.GUBUN AND USE_YN = 'Y') AS GUBUN_NAME FROM NBM_INVESTMENT I LEFT JOIN NBM_COMPANY_INFO C ON C.COMPANY_CODE = I.COMPANY_CODE WHERE 1 = 1
AND I.COMPANY_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
ORDER BY C.GUBUN, I.COMPANY_NAME

SELECT COMPANY_CODE, GUBUN, (SELECT CODE_NAME FROM COM_CODE WHERE CODE_GROUP = '160' AND CODE_VALUE = GUBUN AND USE_YN = 'Y') AS GUBUN_NAME, COMPANY_NAME, TYPE, USED, REG_DATE FROM NBM_COMPANY_INFO WHERE 1 = 1
AND COMPANY_NAME LIKE '%' || #{companyName} || '%'
AND USED = #{used}
ORDER BY GUBUN, COMPANY_CODE
mapper.insert:
SELECT LPAD(TO_CHAR(NVL(MAX(TO_NUMBER(COMPANY_CODE)), 0) + 1), 4, '0') FROM NBM_COMPANY_INFO
INSERT INTO NBM_COMPANY_INFO ( COMPANY_CODE, GUBUN, COMPANY_NAME, TYPE, USED, REG_DATE, REG_USERID ) VALUES ( #{companyCode}, #{gubun}, #{companyName}, #{type}, #{used}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{regUserid} )
mapper.select: SELECT m.MASTER_NO, m.BIZ_TITLE, m.CONNECTION_INFO, cc.CODE_NAME AS CONNECTION_NAME, NVL(ip.TOTAL_INVESTMENT, 0) AS TOTAL_INVESTMENT, NVL(ip.PAID_INVESTMENT, 0) AS PAID_INVESTMENT, NVL(ip.TOTAL_INVESTMENT, 0) - NVL(ip.PAID_INVESTMENT, 0) AS REMAIN_INVESTMENT FROM NBM_BIZ_MASTER m LEFT JOIN COM_CODE cc ON cc.CODE_GROUP = '152' AND cc.CODE_VALUE = m.CONNECTION_INFO LEFT JOIN ( SELECT MASTER_NO, SUM(WONS) AS TOTAL_INVESTMENT, SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(INVESTMENT_DATE, 1, 7) <= #{searchYearMonth} THEN WONS ELSE 0 END) AS PAID_INVESTMENT FROM NBM_INVESTMENT_PAID GROUP BY MASTER_NO ) ip ON ip.MASTER_NO = m.MASTER_NO WHERE (m.DEL_FLAG IS NULL OR m.DEL_FLAG != 'Y') ORDER BY m.CONNECTION_INFO NULLS LAST, m.BIZ_TITLE

SELECT m.MASTER_NO, m.BIZ_TITLE, m.CONNECTION_INFO, cc.CODE_NAME AS CONNECTION_NAME, NVL(pf.TOTAL_PF, 0) AS TOTAL_PF, NVL(pf.PAID_PRINCIPAL, 0) AS PAID_PRINCIPAL, NVL(pf.PAID_INTEREST, 0) AS PAID_INTEREST, NVL(pf.TOTAL_PF, 0) - NVL(pf.PAID_PRINCIPAL, 0) AS REMAIN_PF FROM NBM_BIZ_MASTER m LEFT JOIN COM_CODE cc ON cc.CODE_GROUP = '152' AND cc.CODE_VALUE = m.CONNECTION_INFO LEFT JOIN ( SELECT MASTER_NO, SUM(PRINCIPAL) + MAX(OUTSTANDING) KEEP (DENSE_RANK LAST ORDER BY PF_DATE) AS TOTAL_PF, SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(PF_DATE, 1, 7) <= #{searchYearMonth} THEN PRINCIPAL ELSE 0 END) AS PAID_PRINCIPAL, SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(PF_DATE, 1, 7) <= #{searchYearMonth} THEN INTEREST ELSE 0 END) AS PAID_INTEREST FROM NBM_PF_REPAYMENT GROUP BY MASTER_NO ) pf ON pf.MASTER_NO = m.MASTER_NO WHERE (m.DEL_FLAG IS NULL OR m.DEL_FLAG != 'Y') ORDER BY m.CONNECTION_INFO NULLS LAST, m.BIZ_TITLE
